originalTitle: Prince Harry sued for defamation by charity Sentebale he co-founded
title: Prince Harry sued for defamation by charity Sentebale he co-founded
content: Prince Harry left the charity last year in an acrimonious dispute over how Sentebale was being managed.

originalTitle: Chimpanzees in Uganda locked in vicious 'civil war', say researchers
title: Chimpanzees in Uganda locked in vicious 'civil war', say researchers
content: The once close-knit community of Ngogo chimpanzees have been at loggerheads for the last eight years.

originalTitle: Popular Tanzanian musician Matonya charged with rape in Kenya
title: Popular Tanzanian musician Matonya charged with rape in Kenya
content: The 43-year-old denies the charge and has been released on bail and had to surrender his passport.

originalTitle: New tensions emerge before US-Iran war ceasefire talks in Pakistan
title: New tensions emerge before US-Iran war ceasefire talks in Pakistan
content: Iranian official says conditions still not met before talks, as Trump re-ups threat of renewed attacks.

originalTitle: UK police arrest man after four die during Channel crossing attempt
title: UK police arrest man after four die during Channel crossing attempt
content: The National Crime Agency (NCA) said a Sudanese man was detained on suspicion of 'endangering another'.

originalTitle: Is the US-Iran ceasefire already doomed?
title: Is the US-Iran ceasefire already doomed?
content: Even if the talks fail to produce a deal, a return to an all-out war may still be averted.

originalTitle: Trump says Iran's handling of Strait of Hormuz is 'not the agreement we have'
title: Trump says Iran's handling of Strait of Hormuz is 'not the agreement we have'
content: The US president accused Iran of "doing a very poor job" with the waterway as Israel and Lebanon to begin peace talks.

originalTitle: Lebanon says ceasefire must be in place before Israel talks
title: Lebanon says ceasefire must be in place before Israel talks
content: Lebanon will only take part in talks with Israel if a ceasefire is already in place, a senior official tells the BBC.

originalTitle: Palestinian shot dead during Israeli settler attack on occupied West Bank village
title: Palestinian shot dead during Israeli settler attack on occupied West Bank village
content: The killing came as ex-security chiefs warned "government sponsored Jewish terrorism" was out of control.

originalTitle: I'm not better than Frank or Tudor - Spurs boss De Zerbi
title: I'm not better than Frank or Tudor - Spurs boss De Zerbi
content: Tottenham boss Roberto de Zerbi says he is "not better" than predecessors Thomas Frank or Igor Tudor as he prepares to take charge of his first game at the Premier League strugglers.

originalTitle: Fernandez sorry but will miss Man City - Rosenior
title: Fernandez sorry but will miss Man City - Rosenior
content: Chelsea midfielder Enzo Fernandez is still unavailable for the upcoming home match against Manchester City despite a recent apology, head coach Liam Rosenior says.

originalTitle: Nike investigating issue with World Cup kits
title: Nike investigating issue with World Cup kits
content: Sportswear giant Nike is investigating a design issue with the shirts set to be worn by several teams - including England - at this summer's World Cup.
